---
title: "Projects"
---

<div class="quarto-listing quarto-listing-container-grid" id="listing-listing">
<div class="list grid quarto-listing-cols-3" id="projects-grid"></div>
<div class="listing-no-matching d-none">No matching items</div>
</div>

<script>
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    // Fetch JSON data for sections
    const renderers = {
      'list-publications': (item) => `${item.authors} <strong>${item.title}</strong>. <em>${item.status}</em>`,
      'list-civic-engagement': (item) => `<a href="${item.url}" target="_blank">${item.title}</a>, ${item.description} (${item.date})`,
      'list-presentations': (item) => {
        let html = `<a href="${item.url}" target="_blank">${item.title}</a>, a ${item.type} ${item.description}`;
        if (item.event) {
          html += item.event_url ? `, presented at <a href="${item.event_url}" target="_blank">${item.event}</a>` : `, presented at ${item.event}`;
        }
        if (item.context) {
          html += item.context_url ? `, <a href="${item.context_url}" target="_blank">${item.context}</a>` : `, ${item.context}`;
        }
        return html + ` (${item.date})`;
      },
      'list-posters': (item) => `<a href="${item.url}" target="_blank">${item.title}</a>, a ${item.type} ${item.description}, presented at <a href="${item.event_url}" target="_blank">${item.event}</a> (${item.date})`,
      'list-events': (item) => {
        let html = `<a href="${item.url}" target="_blank">${item.title}</a>, ${item.description}`;
        if (item.date) html += ` (${item.date})`;
        if (item.details) html += `<br><blockquote style="margin-top: 0.5rem; color: #666; border-left: 3px solid #ccc; padding-left: 1rem;">${item.details}</blockquote>`;
        return html;
      },
      'list-open-source': (item) => `<a href="${item.url}" target="_blank">${item.title}</a>, ${item.description} (${item.date})`
    };

    const dataSources = [
      { id: 'list-publications', file: 'www/publications.json' },
      { id: 'list-civic-engagement', file: 'www/civic-engagement.json' },
      { id: 'list-presentations', file: 'www/presentations.json' },
      { id: 'list-posters', file: 'www/posters.json' },
      { id: 'list-events', file: 'www/events.json' },
      { id: 'list-open-source', file: 'www/open-source.json' }
    ];

    dataSources.forEach(source => {
      fetch(source.file)
        .then(response => response.json())
        .then(items => {
          const ul = document.getElementById(source.id);
          if (ul) {
            items.forEach(item => {
              const li = document.createElement('li');
              li.innerHTML = renderers[source.id] ? renderers[source.id](item) : '';
              ul.appendChild(li);
            });
          }
        })
        .catch(err => console.error('Error loading ' + source.file, err));
    });

    fetch('www/projects.json')
      .then(response => response.json())
      .then(items => {
        const grid = document.getElementById('projects-grid');
        if (grid) {
          items.forEach((item, index) => {
            const dataCategories = btoa(encodeURIComponent(item.categories.join(',')));
            const catsHtml = item.categories.map(cat => 
              `<div class="listing-category" onclick="window.quartoListingCategory('${btoa(encodeURIComponent(cat))}'); return false;">${cat}</div>`
            ).join('\n');

            const itemHtml = `
<div class="g-col-1" data-index="${index}" data-categories="${dataCategories}" data-listing-date-sort="null" data-listing-file-modified-sort="null">
<a href="${item.path}" class="quarto-grid-link" target="_blank">
<div class="quarto-grid-item card h-100 card-left">
<p class="card-img-top">
<img loading="lazy" src="${item.image}" class="thumbnail-image card-img" style="height: 150px;">
</p>
<div class="card-body post-contents">
<h5 class="no-anchor card-title listing-title">
${item.title}
</h5>
<div class="listing-categories">
${catsHtml}
</div>
<div class="card-text listing-description delink">
<p>${item.description}</p>
</div>
<div class="card-attribution card-text-small start">
<div class="listing-author">
${item.author}
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div></a>
</div>`;
            grid.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', itemHtml);
          });
        }
      })
      .catch(err => console.error('Error loading projects.json', err));

    // Script to override listing hyperlinks behaviour, forcing to open them on new tab
    const container = document.querySelector('#listing-listing');
    if (container) {
      const links = container.querySelectorAll('a');
      links.forEach(link => {
        link.setAttribute('target', '_blank');
      });
    }

    // Script to change elements order (first projects list, then contributions)
    const listing = document.getElementById("listing-listing");

    const sections = ["civic-engagement-open-data", "publications", "presentations", "posters", "events-organization", "open-source-contributions"];

    if (listing) {
      const parent = listing.parentNode;
      sections.forEach(id => {
        const el = document.getElementById(id);
        if (el) parent.append(el);
      });
    }
  });
</script>


# Publications

<ul id="list-publications"></ul>


# Civic engagement & open data

<ul id="list-civic-engagement"></ul>


# Presentations

<ul id="list-presentations"></ul>


# Posters

<ul id="list-posters"></ul>


# Events organization

<ul id="list-events"></ul>


# Open source contributions

<ul id="list-open-source"></ul>
